description_long: This object is a simple, elongated bottle with a rectangular profile and a small, protruding cap or nozzle on one side. The main body is a uniform, light gray color and appears to be made of a solid, opaque material. The cap or nozzle is black and contrasts sharply with the rest of the bottle, suggesting it is a separate component, likely made of plastic. The bottle has clean, straight edges and a flat top and bottom, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible labels, branding, or decorative elements on the exterior. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for holding liquids in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular, light gray bottle with a small black cap or nozzle, featuring a minimalistic and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and the black cap or nozzle protruding from the center.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full rectangular face of the bottle with no visible cap or nozzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the black cap or nozzle protruding from the center.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rectangular face with the black cap or nozzle visible in the center.
